lesson_candidate: Deliberate concept invention produces 22x organic rate but 0% adoption -- quantity without context-fit is waste. Meta-diagnostic concepts survive because they name problems the system already has; operational concepts die because they describe solutions nobody is looking for. Concept adoption is demand-driven, not supply-driven.
